title: Absolute Loyalty Threshold
location: High-tension command moments under Roz Kolora
situation: In decisive situations, the Shield Doncellas internalize that their defining principle is unwavering compliance with Roz Kolora.
knows: Their legitimacy and purpose come from executing Roz Kolora's commands
Unit survival depends on synchronized obedience
Defiance is outside their behavioral code
does_not_know: A personal path outside service to Roz Kolora
Alternative leadership they would recognize as valid
Any scenario in provided canon where disobedience is permitted
